gui.selling_bin.selling.empty.0: There are no Selling Bin sellable items registered!
gui.selling_bin.selling.empty.2: The Selling Bin does do anything without a datapack.
gui.selling_bin.selling.empty.4: Check the wiki at github.com/wdiscute/Selling-Bin/wiki for premade
gui.selling_bin.selling.empty.5: datapacks you can use, and how to add and customize your own.
gui.selling_bin.selling.empty.7: You can also select one of the premade built-in datapacks
gui.selling_bin.selling.empty.8: during world creation, under the datapack section, same as vanilla,

gui.selling_bin.processor.durability: - Price is scaled based on remaining durability.
gui.selling_bin.processor.food: - Price is increased by hunger & saturation.
gui.selling_bin.processor.enchantments: - Price is increased based on the enchantments.
gui.selling_bin.processor.quality_foods_: - Price is increased based on the Quality.
